hypothesis: Combining RSI, ATR and ROC indicators can provide a robust trading signal in the crypto market.

This strategy has been designed to identify potential buying opportunities in the crypto market by using RSI(3), ATR and ROC as indicators. The conditions for entering a long position are when both RSI>80 and Aroon Up is above 75%. On the other hand, the signal to enter a short position will be given if both RSI<20 and RSI<3 at the same time. This strategy ensures robust results through its non-conventional filters which help avoid random behavior in the market such as mode_counter_consensus filter that confirms any contradictory data, and another one for time/hourly filtering known as 'mode_microstructure'.
